name: Zycus Procurement API
what_it_does: Zycus REST API for AI-powered source-to-pay procurement suite. Enables AI agents to manage suppliers, purchase orders, contracts, sourcing events, and spend analytics through Zycus Merlin AI-powered procurement platform. Zycus covers e-sourcing, e-procurement, contract management, and supplier performance management.
use_cases: Managing supplier lifecycle and performance from procurement automation agents
Processing purchase orders and approvals from P2P workflow agents
Automating contract creation and management from legal-procurement integration agents
Analyzing spend and category data from procurement intelligence agents
not_for: SMB procurement without enterprise procurement process requirements
Simple invoice processing without full procurement lifecycle management
best_when: An enterprise procurement team using Zycus wants AI agents to automate supplier onboarding, purchasing workflows, and spend analysis across the Zycus platform.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Procurement operations involve contractual financial commitments. Integration errors can create unauthorized POs or supplier data inconsistencies.

auth.notes: Zycus uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. Enterprise API access requires customer account setup and integration enablement. Token management standard OAuth flow.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per module; pricing negotiated by deployment size
pricing.notes: India-headquartered enterprise procurement company. Global deployments. API access with enterprise license.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLAs; rate limits per API key

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Procurement commitments and contracts have real financial implications
No public MCP server — enterprise-only API requiring dedicated setup
Limited public API documentation — requires enterprise customer access
India-headquartered company with global data centers
Complex procurement domain model — sourcing, P2P, contracts, SRM are separate modules
AI-powered Merlin features require additional configuration beyond basic API access
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Procurement financial and supplier data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. India HQ with global data residency options. Enterprise-only.

security_score_components.security_notes: Procurement and supplier data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. India HQ. Enterprise-only with limited public docs.
